definitions.failureMessage: manifest.json "description" exceeds the Edge Add-ons limit of 132 characters.
definitions.fix: Shorten the "description" field in manifest.json to 132 characters or fewer. The full marketing description belongs in the store listing, not the manifest.

definitions.failureMessage: JSON does not match all schemas of AllOf - invalid schema indexes
definitions.fix: Edge Add-ons reports this when manifest.json fails the composite (AllOf) schema. Common causes: (1) "manifest_version" is a string instead of the number 3; (2) MV3 "web_accessible_resources" is a flat array of paths instead of [{ "resources": [...], "matches": [...] }]; (3) "content_security_policy" is a string (MV2) in an MV3 manifest - it must be an object { "extension_pages": "..." }; (4) "background" mixes MV2 "scripts" with MV3 "service_worker". Fix each to match MV3 exactly, then re-submit.

"invalid schema indexes" means one or more fields failed their sub-schema. Check: "permissions" must only list API names ("<all_urls>" belongs in "host_permissions"); "host_permissions" must be an array of match patterns, not a single string; "icons" keys must be numeric strings ("16", "48", "128"); every "matches" / "include_globs" / "exclude_globs" must be an array. Validate your manifest against the Chrome MV3 JSON schema before re-submitting.
